query:
INSERT INTO notifications (user_id, company_id, notification_type, title, message, entity_type, entity_id)
        SELECT id, company_id, $2, $3, $4, $5, $6
        FROM users
        WHERE company_id = $1
            AND roles && ARRAY['super_admin', 'payroll_admin', 'hr_manager']::VARCHAR(50)[]
            AND is_active = TRUE
